relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: The elder writes to beloved Gaius in truth.
He prays for health and prospering as the soul prospers.
Joy rises when truth is witnessed in Gaius.
No joy is greater than children walking in truth.
Gaius acts faithfully for siblings and strangers.
His love is testified before the assembly.
They went out for the Name.
Receiving them makes coworkers with truth.
Diotrephes loves first-place and refuses reception.
His harmful speech and blocked hospitality will be remembered.
Demetrius is witnessed by all and by truth itself.
Ink and reed cannot hold everything.
Face-to-face speech and named friends close the letter.

contemplative_note: 3 John is hospitality versus domination: Gaius receives truth-workers; Diotrephes blocks and controls; Demetrius is witnessed by truth.
